content: We can frame a hierarchical self-improvement architecture for autonomous LLM agents where Self-Refine acts as the low-level "tactical" refiner for individual outputs, and Reflexion acts as the high-level "strategic" refiner that accumulates lessons from multiple Self-Refine iterations into long-term dynamic memory to improve future refinement cycles. This creates a nested self-improvement loop that requires no external supervision or additional training at any layer.
